cn.description:
灾后的荒漠小城沙石镇迫切需要全面的重建。
我们诚挚而迫切地邀请您成为新的工坊主，您可以在这里用不同的方式收集资源，在专属工坊中创造各种机器和设备，也可以探索广阔的沙漠，深入废墟，搜寻旧世界遗留的古老文物，甚至与怪物斗智斗勇。经营崭新生活也少不了种植，烹饪，养殖，与沙石镇居民建立不同的关系等等丰富多样的玩法！
工坊主，在这里曾有无数治沙人的努力被风沙掩埋，重现绿洲的梦想似乎遥不可及，如今，使命传递至你的手中，期待你续写让沙石镇重焕生机的史诗篇章。

感谢你体验《沙石镇时光》手游，也由衷感谢你对「良心工作室」的支持。愿你在这片黄沙之地，亲手缔造属于自己的温暖与美好。

【建设专属工坊】
从无到有，一切尽在您手，您可以将各种复杂精密的机器排列组合在一起，打造专属于您的工坊，并制作各式各样的工具或设备；您可以通过劳作，将戈壁变成可耕种的肥沃土地，拥有着特色沙漠种植系统的沙石镇时光是您不能错过的种田游戏；您可以扩建栅栏，养上一大堆沙漠地区特有的动物，成为这个小镇首屈一指的牧场主；全新加入的房屋扩建系统，可以让每个玩家都建造出自己独有的房屋，家园升级不再千篇一律。

【探索开放世界】
广阔天地，任您畅游，您可以探索小镇周围的广阔沙漠，深入各种废墟探险；从充满生活气息的城镇到散发神秘色彩的戈壁，各种新奇的怪物，各种沙漠特色坐骑等您来体验。

【享受甜蜜时光】
在沙石镇，你就是最耀眼的明星！沉浸于超过100小时的主线剧情，探索数百个支线故事，与40多位性格各异的角色相遇、相识、相知。他们每个人都有独一无二的故事等你揭开，或许，还会与某个人擦出意想不到的爱情火花……

【战斗，就是要炫！】
通过自由搭配技能树，解锁酷炫招式，驾驭各式强力武器，迎战千奇百怪的怪物军团。这里的每一场战斗，都让你酣畅淋漓！

【不止好玩，更要好听好看】
更多的？可以有！你可以听到更加生动和动感的音乐，并且体验新的声效技术，让您仅凭声音就能知道身处何方！独特的天气系统，带你感受“黄沙万里滔天”的壮丽奇观。更有丰富趣味小游戏等你来玩，让你在工坊经营之余体验到多彩的沙石镇风土人情。

【移动端专属装扮】
手游专属礼服？免费送！我们为工坊主们提供了移动端专属的各种装扮，从国风礼服到清爽T恤，只为让你在沙石镇活出不一样的人生！

【手游适配与优化】
厌倦了在PC端的繁琐操作？试试更懂你的移动端！
贴合掌心的操作优化，专为手游触屏设计。
PC端组装太麻烦？移动端极简操作不再烦恼！
另外，还有更醒目的视觉指引与交互引导，助你畅游沙石镇！

【设备要求与说明】
为保证游戏流畅体验，我们推荐使用运行内存（RAM）为6GB及以上的iOS设备进行游玩。
《沙石镇时光》是一款包含许多3D模型渲染的游戏，即便是PC端也需要GTX1060及以上的显卡才能畅玩，为了能在手机上精细呈现沙石镇的生动细节，我们做了很多的移动端兼容适配，但无法避免的是对设备还是有一定的性能要求，尤其是在iOS端的运行内存（RAM）方面。
同时，为了确保游戏可以兼容更多的IOS低端设备，我们也不得已对运行内存（RAM）为4GB的设备做了一些调整，在游戏中会缺少人物对话语音，以及在游戏存档后期（如小镇建筑、NPC数量增加时），运行内存为4GB的设备可能会出现卡顿情况，极端情况下可能出现闪退。
（运行内存为6GB及以上设备完全不会受到上述内容影响）
使用RAM为4GB设备的工坊主，若比较在意游戏目前的优化状况，还请谨慎购买。但毫无疑问，我们将尽快进行版本更迭，努力为更多设备带来更优秀的游戏体验。

注：游戏安装后约占13GB储存空间，需预留16GB或更多储存空间，以确保游戏可以顺利安装与加载资源。

===铁皮公司正版授权===

比以往任何时候都更具威胁和力量，王国保卫战5 带来了一种全新、令人兴奋的体验，以其前作的快节奏和引人入胜的玩法为基础，赢得了奖项的赞誉。

当一个强大的邪恶势力在王国上空出现时，一个意想不到的联盟形成了——发动终极塔防战役，用两支军队中最精锐的力量来保卫整个王国和领域！虽然他们暂时并肩作战，但临时联盟内部典型的纷争可能会改变后续冒险的走向。

准备好释放双英雄的强大力量，在塔防战斗中扭转战局吧！
没错，现在你可以同时控制两条龙！双倍的喷火乐趣，双倍的混乱——只要确保他们不会因为谁能囤积更多的金子争吵！

所有重量级角色如圣骑士、弓箭手、法师、死灵法师等等都听你指挥。但要注意，他们可能会开始争论谁是队伍中的真正英雄，而敌人却悄悄溜过去！ 
你准备好迎接终极对决了吗？和利尼维亚的勇敢战士们以及不屈不挠的黑暗军团，踏上征服一个巨大敌人的史诗旅程。  

游戏特色：
招募34名独特的英雄和防御塔！

- 18个精英防御塔的建造和升级
骑士顶在最前方、弓箭手百步穿杨、法师的奥术魔法、死灵法师的亡灵之力，甚至还有能召唤恶魔的深渊祭坛！——这些经典强力塔都将听从你的号令！

- 16个史诗英雄 - 将塔防战斗提升到新的水平
同时控制2名英雄去战斗！
准备见证最不可能的双英雄组合的强大威力！森林守护灵搭配钢铁傀儡？
时空法师携手“普通勇士”？看似离奇的搭档，也能爆发惊人威力！

- 6种不同地形，更有迷人的战场等你征服
保卫Kingdom Rush的多彩景观。穿越王国深林，甚至其危险的洞穴作战。

- 25个充满快节奏塔防战斗的战役阶段
在充满惊喜挑战和细节的异国地形中设定你的策略。
面对成群的不可预测的敌人和史诗般的boss战斗，将你的防御策略推向极限！

- 3种不同的游戏模式来测试你的实力
在取得胜利后，尝试以更具挑战性的方式玩每个阶段。谁不喜欢一个好的挑战呢？

- 58多个游戏成就在战斗中征服
没有诱人的奖励，史诗策略游戏算什么？展示你的技能，解锁奖励！

- 45种以上不同的敌人来测试你的塔防智慧
展现联盟的塔防战斗技能，对抗4个不同的敌人氏族。用独特的防御策略击败他们每一个！

- 当然…
有很多复活节彩蛋和Ironhide Game Studio一贯的轻松幽默。
因为没有一些隐藏的惊喜，策略游戏算什么呢？

hk.description:
FlowDown is a fast, minimal AI chat app that makes working with large language models feel smooth, focused, and under your control.

For guides, tips, and advanced setup help, visit flowdown.ai.

Why FlowDown

Lightweight and efficient  
Focus on your conversation, not the app. FlowDown launches quickly, stays out of your way, and keeps long chats responsive, even on busy machines.

Rich formatting with Markdown  
Get clear, readable answers. FlowDown renders Markdown beautifully, so code blocks, bullet lists, tables, and headings in AI responses are easy to scan and use.

Works with the tools you already have  
Connect to any OpenAI-compatible API, from major cloud providers to services running in your own home lab. If it speaks the OpenAI API, FlowDown can talk to it.

Talk with text, images, and audio  
Show, not just tell. Paste screenshots, drop in images, or record your voice to ask questions. Use it to:
- Transcribe meetings or lectures
- Summarize voice notes
- Ask about the content inside a photo

Smooth, instant-feeling conversations  
Blazing-fast text rendering makes responses stream in fluidly, so you can start reading and refining your prompt without waiting for the model to finish.

Automatic chat titles  
Stop hunting for the right thread. FlowDown names your conversations automatically based on their content, so you can quickly find that "API bug fix" or "Trip planning" chat later.

Shortcut integrations  
Use FlowDown inside your workflows. With Shortcuts support, you can:
- Send selected text from another app to your model
- Generate drafts, summaries, or replies with one tap
- Build custom automations that call your favourite model

Privacy by design  
Your data is yours. FlowDown does not collect your chats. For maximum confidentiality, you can run models locally on your own machine with no external server involved.

Open source and transparent  
Every line of code is available on GitHub. Inspect it, audit it, or adapt it for your own setups. You can see exactly how your AI client works.

Free trial and open code

FlowDown is fully open source, and we provide a free trial so you can confirm it fits your workflow before buying.

Source code and trial builds are available at:  
https://github.com/Lakr233/FlowDown

Lightweight and efficient  
Focus on your conversation, not the app. FlowDown launches quickly, stays out of your way, and keeps long chats responsive, even on busy machines.

Rich formatting with Markdown  
Get clear, readable answers. FlowDown renders Markdown beautifully, so code blocks, bullet lists, tables, and headings in AI responses are easy to scan and use.

Works with the tools you already have  
Connect to any OpenAI-compatible API, from major cloud providers to services running in your own home lab. If it speaks the OpenAI API, FlowDown can talk to it.

Talk with text, images, and audio

- Transcribe meetings or lectures
- Summarize voice notes
- Ask about the content inside a photo

Smooth, instant-feeling conversations  
Blazing-fast text rendering makes responses stream in fluidly, so you can start reading and refining your prompt without waiting for the model to finish.

Automatic chat titles  
Stop hunting for the right thread. FlowDown names your conversations automatically based on their content, so you can quickly find that "API bug fix" or "Trip planning" chat later.

Shortcut integrations  
Use FlowDown inside your workflows. With Shortcuts support, you can:
- Send selected text from another app to your model
- Generate drafts, summaries, or replies with one tap
- Build custom automations that call your favourite model

Privacy by design  
Your data is yours. FlowDown does not collect your chats. For maximum confidentiality, you can run models locally on your own machine with no external server involved.

Open source and transparent  
Every line of code is available on GitHub. Inspect it, audit it, or adapt it for your own setups. You can see exactly how your AI client works.

# REMOTE, MOUSE & KEYBOARD — YOUR ALL-IN-ONE CONTROL CENTER

Turn your iPhone or iPad into a universal remote, wireless mouse, keyboard, and automation hub — all in one powerful app.
With Remote, Mouse & Keyboard, you can control your Apple TV, Mac, Windows PC, or even another iPad seamlessly over Wi-Fi or Bluetooth.
Whether you’re streaming, presenting, or working remotely — take full control of your digital world.

# APPLE TV REMOTE — SIMPLE AND INTUITIVE
No more lost remotes or endless scrolling. Connect via Wi-Fi and take charge of your Apple TV with ease.

- Works with all Apple TV models
- Control volume, playback, and media functions
- Navigate with a smooth touchpad
- Type comfortably with the built-in keyboard
- Launch apps instantly from your device

(Older Apple TV models such as Gen 1–3 require one-time PIN entry using a physical remote.)

Your iPhone becomes the most advanced Apple TV remote ever.

# COMPUTER CONTROL — MAC & WINDOWS
Take full command of your computer — Mac or Windows — directly from your iPhone or iPad.
Designed for productivity, comfort, and speed.

Remote Control & Media:
- Adjust volume, playback, and tracks
- Use pre-made control panels for popular apps and websites
- Create custom control panels for any software

Mouse & Keyboard:
- Turn your device into a wireless mouse and keyboard
- View your computer screen live on your phone or tablet
- Capture screenshots remotely
- Use gestures like scroll and zoom

Apps & Automation:
- Launch or quit apps, access menus, and trigger shortcuts
- Integrate Siri Shortcuts and Timers
- Perform system actions — sleep, restart, logout, and more
- Create custom automation scripts
- Open websites in your preferred browser
- Manage all scheduled actions in one place

Requirements:
- macOS 10.13 or newer or Windows 7 or newer
- Free helper app download: https://rs.ltd/get

Your all-in-one remote desktop and input tool — secure, fast, and intuitive.

# IPAD CONTROL — DUAL-DEVICE BRILLIANCE
Use your iPhone to control another iPad via Bluetooth.
Perfect for multitasking, streaming, or creative setups.

- Adjust volume and playback
- Type and navigate using keyboard and touchpad

Your iPhone becomes the perfect companion for your iPad.

# WHY YOU’LL LOVE IT
- All-in-one app for Apple TV, Mac, Windows, and iPad
- Customizable control panels and shortcuts
- Live screen view for real-time interaction
- Siri & Shortcuts integration
- Timer automation for smart workflows
- Secure Wi-Fi and Bluetooth connections
- Free companion helper app for computers
- Clean, intuitive iOS design

# SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS
- Apple TV: All models supported
- Mac: macOS 10.13 or later
- Windows: Windows 7 or later
- iPad: Bluetooth connection supported
- Helper app download: https://rs.ltd/get

# THE FUTURE OF CONTROL
Stop juggling remotes and keyboards — unify them.
From managing your Mac or PC to pausing your Apple TV or typing on your iPad, Remote, Mouse & Keyboard makes control effortless.

Smart. Seamless. Powerful.
Take control — with Remote, Mouse & Keyboard.

us.description:
Genius Scan is a document scanner app in your pocket. Quickly scan your paper documents on the go and export them as multi-page PDF files.

*** Apple App of the Week *** 20+ million users *** 1000s of small businesses ***

Place any document in front of your device’s camera: our scanner app automatically recognizes the paper against the background, crops it, and cleans up the result. You obtain a crisp, legible scan. Batch scanning lets you scan dozens of pages in a matter of seconds. Powerful tools help you organize, share, or archive your documents.

“Next time you plan to hit the road, don’t forget to download Genius Scan to make life easier for yourself and your accounting department.” - AppPicker.com

“Camera apps aren’t designed for close-up text scanning, but Genius Scan is.” - The Guardian

== ENTERPRISE EDITION ==

Genius Scan Plus Premium Plan:

- All the premium features of the Genius Scan Plus Premium Plan (denoted with + below), out of the box (no upgrade needed).

Managed Configuration:

- Deployment to fleets of devices managed by a MDM tool
- Pre-configuration of app settings on a per-user basis (eg. set default email address, WebDAV/FTP credentials)
- Control of which apps and services users can export documents to
- No ads

== KEY FEATURES == 

Smart Scanning:

- Document detection & background removal
- Distortion correction
- Shadow removal and defect cleanup
- Filters (black & white, whiteboard, photo)
- Batch scanning

PDF Creation & Editing:

- Document merging & splitting
- Multiple page PDF creation
- Photos and PDF import

Security & Privacy:

- On-device document processing
+ Face ID locking
+ PDF password encryption

Document Organization:

- Document tagging
- Metadata and content search
+ Smart document renaming (custom templates, …)
+ Backup and multi-device sync with Genius Cloud (separate subscription)

Export:

- Email
+ Box, Dropbox, Evernote, Expensify, Google Drive, iCloud Drive, OneDrive, OneNote, FTP, SugarSync, WebDAV.
+ Any WebDAV compatible service such as Citrix ShareFile, NextCloud, ownCloud, Synology, Yandex. 
+ Automatic background auto-export

OCR (Text Recognition):

+ Text extraction
+ Searchable PDF creation
+ Business card scanning & contact creation

== ABOUT US ==

It’s in the heart of Paris, France that The Grizzly Labs develops Genius Scan. We take pride in crafting apps that help millions of users throughout the world and hold ourselves to the highest standards in terms of quality and privacy. Get in touch with us @thegrizzlylabs if you have any questions.

== PRICING & LEGAL ==

You can subscribe to Genius Cloud for backup & synchronization. In that case, Genius Scan’s store displays the duration and price of each subscription, updated at the time of purchase. Payment will be charged to iTunes account when the order is confirmed. Subscriptions automatically renew unless auto-renew is turned off no later than 24 hours before the end of the current period. Manage subscriptions, disable auto-renewal in the iTunes account settings.

請參考在PalReader 網站上的使用錄像來深入了解此應用程序.
閱讀程序具有以下先進功能:

專為iPhone 而做的存儲優化, 存儲相同的圖書比其它程序節省超過30%的空間.
全屏幕閱讀支持. LoudReader 只在用戶需要時顯示控制對話框, 而其它iPhone 閱讀程序顯示控制始終佔用寶貴的屏幕.
支持任意方向閱讀. 程序自動調整圖書顯示方式.
使用HTML顯示圖書的多種字體與圖像, 優於其它程序的單一字體文本顯示方式.
頁內捲動控制幫助讀者在長頁面內快速移動到任意位置.
直觀調整字體大小,顏色以及背景.
手指雙擊擊即可使用的章節選擇, 字體大小控制.
歷史記憶功能幫助用戶快速到任意章節或前後章節
準確回到上次閱讀位置(甚至包括上次卷滾條位置)

us.description:
FlowDown is a fast, minimal AI chat app that makes working with large language models feel smooth, focused, and under your control.

For guides, tips, and advanced setup help, visit flowdown.ai.

Why FlowDown

Lightweight and efficient  
Focus on your conversation, not the app. FlowDown launches quickly, stays out of your way, and keeps long chats responsive, even on busy machines.

Rich formatting with Markdown  
Get clear, readable answers. FlowDown renders Markdown beautifully, so code blocks, bullet lists, tables, and headings in AI responses are easy to scan and use.

Works with the tools you already have  
Connect to any OpenAI-compatible API, from major cloud providers to services running in your own home lab. If it speaks the OpenAI API, FlowDown can talk to it.

Talk with text, images, and audio  
Show, not just tell. Paste screenshots, drop in images, or record your voice to ask questions. Use it to:
- Transcribe meetings or lectures
- Summarize voice notes
- Ask about the content inside a photo

Smooth, instant-feeling conversations  
Blazing-fast text rendering makes responses stream in fluidly, so you can start reading and refining your prompt without waiting for the model to finish.

Automatic chat titles  
Stop hunting for the right thread. FlowDown names your conversations automatically based on their content, so you can quickly find that "API bug fix" or "Trip planning" chat later.

Shortcut integrations  
Use FlowDown inside your workflows. With Shortcuts support, you can:
- Send selected text from another app to your model
- Generate drafts, summaries, or replies with one tap
- Build custom automations that call your favourite model

Privacy by design  
Your data is yours. FlowDown does not collect your chats. For maximum confidentiality, you can run models locally on your own machine with no external server involved.

Open source and transparent  
Every line of code is available on GitHub. Inspect it, audit it, or adapt it for your own setups. You can see exactly how your AI client works.

Free trial and open code

FlowDown is fully open source, and we provide a free trial so you can confirm it fits your workflow before buying.

Source code and trial builds are available at:  
https://github.com/Lakr233/FlowDown  
To try it, open the Releases section and download the latest trial version.

Local models

For offline, private usage, FlowDown can run models locally on Apple Silicon devices with sufficient memory.

Supported model families include:  
Cohere, Gemma, Gemma2, Gemma3, InternLM2, Llama / Mistral, OpenELM, Phi, Phi3, PhiMoE, Qwen2, Qwen3, Starcoder2, MiMo, and GLM4.

This gives you:
- Full control over your data
- No dependency on external servers
- The ability to experiment with different open models

Remote models

A complimentary remote model is included so you can start chatting immediately. This starter service is best-effort, with rate limits and no uptime guarantee.

For consistent, reliable use, we recommend:
- Bringing your own API, or
- Hosting your own inference server on local or home-lab hardware

FlowDown supports all OpenAI-compatible endpoints, making it ideal for connecting to tools like Ollama and LM Studio running on your own machine for maximum privacy.

Some setups require technical knowledge. If you are new to self-hosted AI or custom endpoints, please read our documentation carefully; the app can be challenging without it.

We strongly recommend using the free trial before purchasing, as refunds may not be available. For advanced or enterprise use, configuration examples and best practices are documented on our website.

Important note

AI-generated content can be inaccurate or misleading. Always verify critical information and use FlowDown responsibly; you are responsible for how you use the output.

© 2025 FlowDown Team. All rights reserved.

tr.description:
Küçük bir oyun dükkânıyla başlayın ve onu başarılı bir işletmeye dönüştürün. Gün boyunca dükkânınıza farklı müşteriler gelir. Bazıları eski oyunlarını satmak isterken, bazıları ise koleksiyonlarına ekleyecek özel parçalar arar. Amacınız akıllı anlaşmalar yapmak, doğru fiyata alım yapmak ve kâr ederek satmaktır.

Her oyun farklıdır. Bazılarını bulmak kolaydır, bazıları ise çok daha nadir ve değerlidir. Kutunun ve diskin durumu da büyük önem taşır, bu yüzden her ürünü dikkatlice incelemek işin önemli bir parçasıdır. Bir anlaşma yapmadan önce detaylara bakmalı, müşterinin teklifini değerlendirmeli ve karşı teklif vermeye değip değmeyeceğine karar vermelisiniz. Bazen tek bir iyi pazarlık bile büyük fark yaratabilir.

Daha fazla para kazandıkça dükkânınız büyümeye başlar. İşinizi geliştirebilir, daha iyi ticaretler yapabilir ve zamanla daha güçlü bir koleksiyon oluşturabilirsiniz. Oyun; ikinci el oyun ticaretini, basit pazarlık mekaniklerini, detaylı ürün durumlarını ve sıcak bir retro pixel art tarzını bir araya getirerek keyifli bir dükkân yönetimi deneyimi sunar.

Dükkânınızı büyütün, daha iyi anlaşmalar yapın, harika oyunlar toplayın ve gerçek bir CD’ci olun.

tr.description:
Code Blue is a professional CPR and ALS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters.
Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes.
Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow.

### Core Features ###
DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS
- Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals
- High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded

REAL-TIME EVENT LOG
- Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions
- Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment

COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING
- Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality


### Fully Customizable for Your Practice ###
CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES
- Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms

FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS
Configure the app as a simple CPR timer
Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour


### First Responder & Post-Code Tools ###
FIRST RESPONDER MODE
- Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
- Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map

CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT
- Save previous codes
- Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review


### Evidence-Based Flowcharts ###
ALS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES
- Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts
- Based on ALS and Post-Resuscitation Care guidelines from AHA and ERC


### Built for Healthcare Professionals ###
Designed for use in:
- Emergency Departments
- ICUs
- Wards
- Prehospital and first-responder settings

Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation.


### Support & Legal ###
For suggestions, feature requests, or bug reports, contact:
Customer Support:
suporte.codigoazul@gmail.com

App oferece controle remoto para Mac ou PC, com mouse, teclado e controles de mídia. Ótimo se você conectar seu computador à TV ou projetor, para controlar de um sofá ou cama.

Em 2013, criei este aplicativo para controlar meu Mac Mini conectado a uma TV de tela grande na minha sala. Em 2016, larguei meu emprego e me tornei um desenvolvedor independente, e agora meu único foco é construir meus aplicativos. O aplicativo foi baixado mais de 2.000.000 de vezes ao longo dos anos e tem críticas favoráveis.

PRINCIPAIS CARACTERÍSTICAS
· Mouse e Teclado Remoto
· Controles de mídia para aplicativos e sites populares
· Visualização ao vivo da tela do seu computador
· Comandos do sistema: desligar, reiniciar, dormir, etc.
· Iniciar e encerrar aplicativos
· Use Siri para controlar seu computador
· Controlar saída de som / espelhamento de tela [somente Mac]

CARACTERÍSTICAS AVANÇADAS
· Criar Painéis de Controle
· Adicionar ações personalizadas usando AppleScript / PowerShell

CONFIGURAÇÃO RÁPIDA E FÁCIL
· Instale o aplicativo auxiliar gratuito em https://cherpake.com/get
· Conecte os dois dispositivos à mesma rede

SEGURANÇA
O aplicativo usa medidas de segurança padrão como HTTPS para se comunicar e funciona apenas em sua rede local. Sempre que um dispositivo desconhecido tenta estabelecer uma conexão com seu computador, o aplicativo apresenta uma caixa de diálogo para você optar por permitir ou negar.

REQUISITOS
· Mac com macOS 10.10 ou mais recente
· PC com Windows 7 SP1 ou mais recente
· Último aplicativo auxiliar (disponível em https://cherpake.com/get)
· Conexão de rede compartilhada (WiFi ou Personal Hotspot), consulte https://cherpake.com/connect

TESTE GRÁTIS
Este aplicativo é uma jóia escondida que a maioria das pessoas não sabe que precisa. Essas não são minhas palavras, apenas uma das últimas análises de aplicativos. Ainda não convencido, baixe e instale o aplicativo gratuito e use o teste gratuito para ver você mesmo. Disponível em https://bit.ly/mpcrc

pt.description:
Desenvolvido para instituições, profissionais e alunos que buscam otimizar as manobras de RCP durante uma PCR. O timer foi elaborado e amplamente testado para ter um layout prático, rápido e intuitivo, mesmo no cenário agitado e de elevado estresse de uma PCR.
 
Funções:
- 2 CHRONÔMETROS: timer com 2 relógios distintos para COMPRESSÕES TORÁCICAS e EPINEFRINA, com feedback visual amplo quando excedidos os limites de tempo 
- CUSTOMIZÁVEL: permite adicionar medicamentos, procedimentos e ritmos da sua escolha, separados por categorias
- MÚLTIPLOS AJUSTES disponíveis para o Code Blue se adequar às suas preferências
- MODO FIRST RESPONDER: para aqueles que prestam primeiro atendimento em ambiente extra-hospitalar, opção para salvar as coordenadas dos atendimentos e visualizar no mapa interativa. 
- FLUXOGRAMAS: fluxogramas interativas com as recomendações presentes nos principais guidelines para RCP / PCR do AHA ACLS e ERC. 
- LOG/TIMELINE: resumo prontamente disponível em layout de fácil visualização acessível durante a ocorrência, permitindo manter total controle mesmo em uma PCR complexa de longa duração
- HISTÓRICO: histórico de atendimentos com resumo e indicadores de qualidade de assistência, permitindo revisão e aprimoramento dos atendimentos por equipes e seus gestores
- RELATÓRIO PDF: relatório em PDF com resumo e timeline completo

TERMOS E CONDIÇÕES GERAIS DE USO E DE COMPRA (EULA): https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/eula/

pt.description:
O Genius Scan é um scanner de bolso. Digitalize rapidamente seus documentos em qualquer lugar e exporte-os como arquivos JPEG ou PDF de várias páginas.

*** Apple App of the Week *** mais de 20 milhões de usuários *** milhares de pequenas empresas ***

Posicione qualquer documento em frente à câmera do seu dispositivo: nosso aplicativo digitalizador reconhecerá o papel contra o fundo, cortará sua imagem e limpará o resultado. Você obterá uma digitalização nítida e legível. A digitalização em lote permite que você digitalize dezenas de páginas em apenas alguns segundos. Ferramentas poderosas ajudam a organizar, compartilhar ou arquivar seus documentos.

"Na próxima vez que você planejar viajar, não se esqueça de baixar uma cópia do Genius Scan para facilitar sua vida e a do departamento de contabilidade." - AppPicker.com

"Os aplicativos de câmera não foram projetados para digitalizar textos de perto, mas o Genius Scan sim." - The Guardian

== ENTERPRISE EDITION ==

Pacote Genius Scan+ Premium:

- Todos os recursos premium do Genius Scan+ (indicados com + abaixo), prontos para usar (sem necessidade de atualização).

Configuração gerenciada:

- Implantação em frotas de dispositivos por uma ferramenta MDM
- Definição prévia das configurações do aplicativo por usuário (por exemplo, definir endereço de email padrão, credenciais de WebDAV/FTP)
- Controle de quais aplicativos e serviços para os quais os usuários podem exportar documentos
- Sem anúncios

== PRINCIPAIS RECURSOS == 

Digitalização inteligente:

- Detecção de documento e remoção de fundo
- Correção de distorções
- Remoção de sombras e limpeza de imperfeição
- Filtros (preto e branco, quadro branco, foto)
- Digitalização em lote

Criação e edição de PDF:

- Mescla e divisão de documentos
- Criação de PDF multipáginas
- Importação de fotos e PDF

Segurança e privacidade:

- Processamento de documentos no dispositivo
+ Face ID
+ Criptografia de senha no PDF

Organização de documentos:

- Identificação de documentos
- Pesquisa de metadados e conteúdo
+ Esquemas personalizados de nomenclatura (Smart Document Names)
+ Backup e sincronização multidispositivos da Genius Cloud (assinatura em separado)

Exporta:

- Email
+ Box, Dropbox, Evernote, Expensify, Google Drive, iCloud Drive, OneDrive, OneNote, FTP, SugarSync, WebDAV.
+ Qualquer serviço compatível com WebDAV, como Citrix ShareFile, NextCloud, ownCloud, Synology, Yandex. 
+ Exportação automática de fundo

OCR (Reconhecimento de texto):

+ Extração de texto
+ Criação de PDFs pesquisáveis
+ Leitura de cartões de visita e criação de contatos

== QUEM SOMOS ==

É no coração de Paris, na França, que The Grizzly Labs desenvolve o Genius Scan. Nos orgulhamos por criarmos aplicativos que ajudam milhões de usuários em todo o mundo, e que nos colocam nos mais altos padrões de qualidade e privacidade. Entre em contato conosco @thegrizzlylabs se tiver alguma dúvida.

== PREÇOS E LEGAIS ==

Você pode se inscrever no Genius Cloud para backup e sincronização. Nesse caso, a loja da Genius Scan exibe a duração e o preço de cada assinatura, atualizados no momento da compra. O pagamento será cobrado na conta do iTunes quando o pedido for confirmado. As assinaturas são renovadas automaticamente, a menos que a renovação automática seja desativada até 24 horas antes do final do período atual. Gerenciar assinaturas, desative a renovação automática nas configurações da conta do iTunes.

https://www.thegrizzlylabs.com/genius-scan/cloud/terms

pt.description:
FlowDown is a fast, minimal AI chat app that makes working with large language models feel smooth, focused, and under your control.

For guides, tips, and advanced setup help, visit flowdown.ai.

Why FlowDown

Lightweight and efficient  
Focus on your conversation, not the app. FlowDown launches quickly, stays out of your way, and keeps long chats responsive, even on busy machines.

Rich formatting with Markdown  
Get clear, readable answers. FlowDown renders Markdown beautifully, so code blocks, bullet lists, tables, and headings in AI responses are easy to scan and use.

Works with the tools you already have  
Connect to any OpenAI-compatible API, from major cloud providers to services running in your own home lab. If it speaks the OpenAI API, FlowDown can talk to it.

Talk with text, images, and audio  
Show, not just tell. Paste screenshots, drop in images, or record your voice to ask questions. Use it to:
- Transcribe meetings or lectures
- Summarize voice notes
- Ask about the content inside a photo

Smooth, instant-feeling conversations  
Blazing-fast text rendering makes responses stream in fluidly, so you can start reading and refining your prompt without waiting for the model to finish.

Automatic chat titles  
Stop hunting for the right thread. FlowDown names your conversations automatically based on their content, so you can quickly find that "API bug fix" or "Trip planning" chat later.

Shortcut integrations  
Use FlowDown inside your workflows. With Shortcuts support, you can:
- Send selected text from another app to your model
- Generate drafts, summaries, or replies with one tap
- Build custom automations that call your favourite model

Privacy by design  
Your data is yours. FlowDown does not collect your chats. For maximum confidentiality, you can run models locally on your own machine with no external server involved.

Open source and transparent  
Every line of code is available on GitHub. Inspect it, audit it, or adapt it for your own setups. You can see exactly how your AI client works.

Free trial and open code

FlowDown is fully open source, and we provide a free trial so you can confirm it fits your workflow before buying.

Source code and trial builds are available at:  
https://github.com/Lakr233/FlowDown  
To try it, open the Releases section and download the latest trial version.

Local models

For offline, private usage, FlowDown can run models locally on Apple Silicon devices with sufficient memory.

Supported model families include:  
Cohere, Gemma, Gemma2, Gemma3, InternLM2, Llama / Mistral, OpenELM, Phi, Phi3, PhiMoE, Qwen2, Qwen3, Starcoder2, MiMo, and GLM4.

This gives you:
- Full control over your data
- No dependency on external servers
- The ability to experiment with different open models

Remote models

A complimentary remote model is included so you can start chatting immediately. This starter service is best-effort, with rate limits and no uptime guarantee.

For consistent, reliable use, we recommend:
- Bringing your own API, or
- Hosting your own inference server on local or home-lab hardware

FlowDown supports all OpenAI-compatible endpoints, making it ideal for connecting to tools like Ollama and LM Studio running on your own machine for maximum privacy.

Some setups require technical knowledge. If you are new to self-hosted AI or custom endpoints, please read our documentation carefully; the app can be challenging without it.

We strongly recommend using the free trial before purchasing, as refunds may not be available. For advanced or enterprise use, configuration examples and best practices are documented on our website.

Important note

AI-generated content can be inaccurate or misleading. Always verify critical information and use FlowDown responsibly; you are responsible for how you use the output.
